headline: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Tuesday.
summary: Stay updated with the movements of the S&P500 index one hour before the close of the markets on Tuesday. Discover which stocks are leading as top gainers and losers in today's session.

headline: Avantor® Announces Gerard (Jerry) Porreca as Executive Vice President, Quality and Regulatory
summary: Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR), a leading global provider of mission-critical products and services to customers in the life sciences and advanced technology industries, today announced that Gerard (Jerry) Porreca has joined the company as Executive Vice President, Quality and Regulatory.
